title: carex ramosa var. crinigera
intro: Carex ramosa var. crinigera, also known as the branching sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex ramosa var. crinigera include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
